title: Weld Volume & Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for estimating weld metal volume, weight, cost, and efficiency based on joint geometry, process parameters, and labor factors. Compliant with ISO 9692, AWS D1.1, and Lean Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Joint Type
inputs.businessContext: Select the weld joint geometry per ISO 9692. Affects volume calculation formula.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the weld joint geometry per ISO 9692. Affects volume calculation formula.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 9692'ye göre kaynak birleştirme geometrisini seçin. Hacim hesaplama formülünü etkiler.

inputs.label: Plate Thickness (t)
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the base metal. Critical for groove volume calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the base metal. Critical for groove volume calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel metalin kalınlığı. Oluk hacmi hesaplaması için kritiktir.

inputs.label: Root Face (f)
inputs.businessContext: Land at the root of the groove. Affects effective depth.

businessContext_i18n.en: Land at the root of the groove. Affects effective depth.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oluğun kökündeki düzlük. Etkili derinliği etkiler.

inputs.label: Root Gap (g)
inputs.businessContext: Gap between plates at root. Increases weld volume.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gap between plates at root. Increases weld volume.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kök seviyesinde plakalar arasındaki boşluk. Kaynak hacmini artırır.

inputs.label: Groove Angle (α)
inputs.businessContext: Included angle of V-groove. Standard range per AWS D1.1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Included angle of V-groove. Standard range per AWS D1.1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: V-oluğun dahil açısı. AWS D1.1'e göre standart aralık.

inputs.label: Weld Length (L)
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the weld seam.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the weld seam.

inputs.label: Leg Length (for fillet)
inputs.businessContext: Fillet weld leg size. Only used when joint_type = fillet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fillet weld leg size. Only used when joint_type = fillet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köşe kaynağı bacak boyutu. Yalnızca joint_type = fillet olduğunda kullanılır.

inputs.label: Welding Process
inputs.businessContext: Select the welding process. Affects deposition efficiency and labor rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the welding process. Affects deposition efficiency and labor rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak prosesini seçin. Biriktirme verimliliğini ve işçilik ücretini etkiler.

rules.message: Leg length must be greater than 0 for fillet welds.
Groove angle must be between 20° and 90° for groove welds.
Root face must be less than plate thickness.
Wire feed speed and diameter are required for GMAW process.
Deposition efficiency below 50% indicates potential process issues. Verify parameters.
Operator factor below 20% suggests excessive non-arc time. Consider Lean improvements.

thresholds.message: Total cost exceeds $10,000. Consider alternative joint design or process.
Weld volume exceeds 500,000 mm³. Verify joint dimensions for over-welding.
Deposition efficiency below 60% indicates high waste. Consider process change.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
